title: Transport in French Polynesia
content: Railway s: 0 km Highway s: <br "total:" 2590 km <br "paved:" 1735 km <br "unpaved:" 855 km (1999) Ports and <a href="harbour" harbour</a s: <a href="Mataura%2C%20French%20Polynesia" Mataura</a, <a href="Papeete" Papeete</a, <a href="Rikitea" Rikitea</a, <a href="Uturoa" Uturoa</a <a href="Merchant%20marine" Merchant marine</a: <br "total:" 10 ships (or over) totaling / <br "ships by type:" <a href="cargo%20ship" cargo ship</a 3, <a href="passenger%20ship" passenger ship</a 2, passenger/cargo 3, refrigerated cargo 1, <a href="roll-on/roll-off%20ship" roll-on/roll-off ship</a 1 (2003 est.) <a href="Airport" Airport</a s: 49 (2003 est.) Airports - with paved runways: <br "total:" 37 <br "over 3,047 m:" 2 <br "1,524 to 2,437 m:" 5 <br "914 to 1,523 m:" 23 <br "under 914 m:" 3 (2004 est.) Airports - with unpaved runways: <br "total:" 13 <br "914 to 1,523 m:" 5 <br "under 914 m:" 8 (2004 est.) <a href="Heliport" Heliport</a s 1 (2003 est.)
